headline: The main branch is the desired state for the GitHub Pages site
summary: Update the declarative state through a pull request, let CI validate it, and let CD deploy it after merge.
learningPath: Open a feature branch and change content/site-state.json.
Submit a pull request so CI can validate the proposed desired state.
Merge into main after review and passing checks.
Let CD rebuild the site from the merged Git commit.
Watch GitHub Pages publish the new page so live state matches main.
